subject: Public Health
title: The Diabetes Pandemic
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: The Diabetes Pandemic.

hook.text: Diabetes has quadrupled since 1980—537 million adults now live with it, and it's still accelerating.

buildup.text: Type 2 diabetes is driven by obesity, sedentary lifestyles, and processed diets spreading globally.

discovery.text: Uncontrolled diabetes leads to blindness, kidney failure, amputations, and heart disease—devastating complications.

twist.text: Insulin was discovered in 1921—over 100 years ago—yet millions still can't afford it.

climax.text: The WHO prequalified biosimilar insulin in 2022—a step toward affordable access for all.

punchline.text: A century-old medicine remains unaffordable for millions who need it to survive.

quiz.question: How has diabetes prevalence changed since 1980?
